message:
fix(packs): podman rm/rmi combined-flag bypass (e.g. `podman rm -af`)

The old regex `podman\s+rm\s+.*-f` required characters between `rm` and
`-f`, so combined flags like `-af` placed immediately after `rm` were
not caught. Align with the Docker pack's regex which uses a non-capturing
group with character class: `(?:-[a-zA-Z0-9]*f|--force)`.

Add unit tests covering combined flags for both rm-force and rmi-force.

Inspired by PR #76 (closed without merge per contribution policy).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
